backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Icon, Connection, FreehandDrawing, Line, TextLabel, Image, DiagramState) and CRUD operations for named diagrams and user profiles, with access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report specifying that drag-and-drop in AttackPathToolbar must be restricted so only the thumbnail `` element is draggable, with parent containers and sibling elements set to draggable=false.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, pages, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Threat Hunting Portal' that mounts the React root and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/index.ts: Standalone snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage to capture a canvas element and export it as a PNG data URL.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for report list, create, detail, and attack-path pages, guards them behind Internet Identity authentication, and shows a profile setup modal when no profile exists.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive SVG canvas component supporting multiple drawing tools (select, connect, pen, freehand, line, arrow, text, eraser, image) with drag-and-drop icon placement, resize/rotate handles, and connector rendering via AttackPathConnector.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG connector component rendering a directed arrow between two points with optional rotation, a wider invisible hit area for easier clicking, and a selection indicator circle.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Defines an `AttackPathIcon` React component that renders a named security/network icon from a mapped image file, with optional label and drag support for toolbar use.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Renders a toolbar for the attack path canvas with drawing tool buttons (select, pen, text, line, arrow, connector, eraser), action buttons (save, load, undo, redo, clear, image upload), and a draggable icon palette.
frontend/src/components/DiagramSidebar.t: Displays a scrollable sidebar listing all saved diagrams with thumbnail previews, icon/connection counts, drag-to-canvas support, and delete-with-confirmation functionality.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main app shell with a sticky header (navigation links, user profile, login button), an optional hero banner on the home page, a main content area, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: A modal dialog that lists saved diagrams in a grid with draggable thumbnails, load buttons, and delete-with-confirmation, fetching data via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a logout button when the user is authenticated via Internet Identity, clearing the identity and React Query cache on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen that prompts unauthenticated users to authenticate via Internet Identity, showing a loading spinner during the login process.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: A React component that provides a searchable popover for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from a predefined list, plus an input for adding custom technique strings, displaying all selections as removable badges.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: A button component that triggers PDF generation for a given report using the `generateReportPdf` utility, showing a loading spinner during generation and toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that forces new users to enter their name to complete profile setup, submitting via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation and blocking dismissal until saved.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports, managing state for fields like title, author, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, and timeline, then passing validated data to an `onSubmit` callback.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: A dialog component that prompts the user to enter a name before saving an attack path diagram, calling the `onSave` callback with the trimmed name on confirmation.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Exports a static array of MITRE ATT&CK technique objects (id, name, description) covering categories such as Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: A React hook that manages the full local state of an attack path diagram—icons, connections, freehand drawings, lines, text labels, and images—with undo/redo history and position update helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook that deletes a diagram by ID via the actor and invalidates the 'allDiagrams' query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams from the backend actor, returning a list of NamedDiagram objects.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend, with loading state accounting for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single diagram by its bigint ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity, and status state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (get all, get one, save, delete), though all backend calls are stubbed out as the report functionality has been removed from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile to the backend and invalidates the 'currentUserProfile' cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a named diagram state to the backend and invalidates related diagram query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Page component for the attack path diagram editor, composing the toolbar, canvas, sidebar, and save/load dialogs with undo/redo and image upload support.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component that renders a form for creating a new threat hunt report and submits it via the useSaveReport mutation, navigating home on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Page component that displays a detailed view of a single threat hunt report including metadata, executive summary, timeline, attack vector, and evidence sections, with a PDF download button.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React page component that lists all threat hunting reports in a table with options to view, download as PDF, and delete each report, using TanStack Router for navigation.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for html2canvas type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for jsPDF type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility that generates a styled printable HTML document for a threat hunting report and opens it in a new browser window for PDF export.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens (colors, border radius, fonts, shadows, animations) using OKLCH color variables and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration for a React app targeting an ICP canister backend, with path aliasing, environment variable injection, API proxy to local DFX, and global polyfill.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, known issues, and a fix request to restrict drag-and-drop in the AttackPathToolbar so only the thumbnail image element is draggable.
